pattern: After sorting, a balanced survivor set is a contiguous window whose largest value stays within k times its smallest, so a sliding window finds the longest keepable run.
hints: Sorting makes the minimum and maximum of any kept set the window's endpoints.
For each candidate smallest element, how far right can the window extend before max exceeds min times k?
Slide a window over the sorted array, track the longest valid length, and remove everything outside it.

edge_inputs.description: k equals one forces all equal

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(1, 100000)
    return [nums, k]
